rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE YUEN YEE GEE DATED DECEMBER 18, 2015 LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Reformation Of Trust
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/14/17. The following tentative ruling was posted for the 10/3/17 hearing date, which has not been addressed: A filed stamped courtesy paper copy of any petition filed conventionally to initiate a case needed to have been delivered not later than 1:30 p.m. of the day following electronic filing [Local Rule 2.11T, 14.91F]. Filed stamped copy must be delivered to Room 202 no later than 6 court days prior to continued hearing date, along with a proposed order. It is also noted that Exhibit A of the Trust has not been filed to show that the subject real property is a trust asset.
